part.text:
---
## Goal
- Add statusThreshold time.Duration parameter to 20+ job.Run methods across repository (specifically censusJob, TokenRevocationJob, CredentialRenewalJob, TokenRenewalJob, CredentialCleanupJob, CredentialRevocationJob, CredentialStoreCleanupJob, OrphanedHostCleanupJob, SetSyncJob, dataKeyVersionDestructionMonitorJob, tableRewrappingJob, purgeJob, cleanerJob, testJob, rotateRootsJob, upsertWorkerStorageBucketJob, deleteTerminatedJob, sessionConnectionCleanupJob, snapshotJob)

## Constraints & Preferences
- Make change across whole repository
- Project must still typecheck after changes
- Use exact output structure requested by user prompt

## Progress
### Done
- Located job files: internal/census/census_job.go, internal/snapshot/snapshot_job.go, internal/host/plugin/job_set_sync.go, internal/session/session_connection_cleanup.go, internal/pagination/purge/purge_job.go, internal/kms/job/data_key_version_destruction_monitor_job.go, internal/scheduler/cleaner/cleaner_job.go
- Confirmed Run method signatures for job types (most have `func (*JobName) Run(ctx context.Context) error`)
- Created TODO list of 19 jobs to update with statusThreshold parameter

### In Progress
- Adding statusThreshold time.Duration parameter to multiple job.Run methods:
  - censusJob.Run
  - TokenRevocationJob.Run  
  - CredentialRenewalJob.Run
  - TokenRenewalJob.Run (found in internal/credential/vault/jobs.go)
  - CredentialCleanupJob.Run
  - CredentialRevocationJob.Run
  - CredentialStoreCleanupJob.Run
  - OrphanedHostCleanupJob.Run
  - SetSyncJob.Run
  - dataKeyVersionDestructionMonitorJob.Run
  - tableRewrappingJob.Run
  - purgeJob.Run
  - cleanerJob.Run
  - testJob.Run
  - rotateRootsJob.Run
  - upsertWorkerStorageBucketJob.Run (special case for context.Context)
  - deleteTerminatedJob.Run (already has threshold field, update signature)
  - sessionConnectionCleanupJob.Run
  - snapshotJob.Run

### Blocked
- Some serena_find_symbol requests timed out when searching specific job types
- Large result sets from searches truncated (877+ chars in some outputs)

## Key Decisions
- Use `statusThreshold time.Duration` parameter name consistently across all jobs (as specified in prompt for testJob.Run specifically)
- All Run methods currently have signature `func (*JobName) Run(ctx context.Context) error`, adding statusThreshold as additional parameter after ctx
- Special case: upsertWorkerStorageBucketJob.Run needs different signature change for context.Context parameter

## Next Steps
1. Add statusThreshold time.Duration to remaining job.Run methods (7+ more jobs to complete)
2. Verify all Run signatures compile with new parameters
3. Update any callers of these Run methods if applicable
4. Type check entire project after changes

## Critical Context
- Current Run method signature pattern: `func (*JobName) Run(ctx context.Context) error`
- New signature should be: `func (*JobName) Run(ctx context.Context, statusThreshold time.Duration) error`
- Some jobs already have threshold fields (e.g., deleteTerminatedJob has `.threshold time.Duration`)
- TokenRenewalJob.Run found with 140-line function body in internal/credential/vault/jobs.go

## Relevant Files
- internal/census/census_job.go
- internal/snapshot/snapshot_job.go
- internal/host/plugin/job_set_sync.go (SetSyncJob)
- internal/session/session_connection_cleanup.go (sessionConnectionCleanupJob)
- internal/pagination/purge/purge_job.go (purgeJob)
- internal/kms/job/data_key_version_destruction_monitor_job.go (dataKeyVersionDestructionMonitorJob)
- internal/scheduler/cleaner/cleaner_job.go (cleanerJob)
- internal/credential/vault/jobs.go (TokenRenewalJob, TokenRevocationJob)
